description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by a lush garden with flowering trees and shrubs. The structure features a medium-pitched gable roof with a prominent overhang, and the exterior walls are clad in a warm, earthy tone. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. A small porch with steps leads up to the main entrance, which is centrally located on the front facade. The property is encircled by a ring of large, irregularly shaped rocks, creating a natural boundary. The landscaping includes a small pond and various garden elements, enhancing the tranquil suburban setting.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, large windows, and a central porch, surrounded by a landscaped garden and a ring of rocks.
description_view_0: The front and one side of the bungalow are visible, showing the central porch, large windows, and lush garden with flowering trees.
description_view_1: The rear of the bungalow is mostly visible, with the rock boundary more prominent and the garden elements partially obscured.
description_view_2: A side and partial front view, highlighting the gable roof, side windows, and the landscaped garden with a pond.
description_view_3: A direct top-down view of the front facade, clearly showing the porch, symmetrical window arrangement, and surrounding garden.
